with generator instances, in calls

subtests.name: with generator instances, in arrays

subtests.name: with generic iterables, in calls
subtests.code:
var iterable = global.__createIterableObject([1, 2, 3]);
        return Math.max(...iterable) === 3;

subtests.name: with generic iterables, in arrays
subtests.code:
var iterable = global.__createIterableObject(["b", "c", "d"]);
        return ["a", ...iterable, "e"][3] === "d";

subtests.name: with instances of iterables, in calls
subtests.code:
var iterable = global.__createIterableObject([1, 2, 3]);
        return Math.max(...Object.create(iterable)) === 3;

subtests.name: with instances of iterables, in arrays
subtests.code:
var iterable = global.__createIterableObject(["b", "c", "d"]);
        return ["a", ...Object.create(iterable), "e"][3] === "d";

        return eval('(/\x2A before \x2A/' + str + '/\x2A after \x2A/)') + '' === str;
